objective: Migrate project hosting to GCP while preserving open-source code posture.

budget.exceptionPolicy: Emergency rollback/safety actions allowed beyond hard stop.

decisions.value: Option A now, full-GCP by milestones
Hybrid cap with hard stop at $300 for normal activity

constraints: No assumptions where ambiguity exists; ask first.
Keep production secrets private in GCP Secret Manager.
Use milestone checkpoints with short logs.
nextSessionPrompt: Continue using docs/AI-HANDOFF.md and docs/AI-HANDOFF.json as source of truth. Respect approved decisions DEC-20260307-01/02/03. Ask before resolving any ambiguity. Propose the next single milestone and expected cost impact first.

notes: Created migration plan with OSS governance track.
Added no-assumption protocol and decision log.
